items.title: Template-safe Word output
items.description: The source of truth is structured resume data, but the final Word file still respects the approved template.

items.title: Shareable PDF delivery
items.description: PDF is generated from the same structured source so the final packet remains visually aligned.

items.title: Export-ready pipeline
items.description: The export page defines the path from source resume to handoff-ready files.

pipeline.title: Export pipeline
pipeline.description: The final export chain is planned around deterministic rendering, not ad-hoc document editing.

items.title: Lock the approved version
items.description: Freeze the exact tailored version that the user approved.

items.title: Map structured sections
items.description: Place each section into the fixed template placeholders.

items.title: Generate DOCX
items.description: Create the editable Word output based on the controlled template.

items.title: Generate PDF
items.description: Render a delivery PDF from the same source so both formats stay in sync.

template.title: Current export source
template.description: The first template is already normalized and stored in the project.

notes.title: Technical notes
notes.description: These notes explain the current state of the export foundation.
items: The original desktop file was converted into a standard DOCX to make template rendering practical.
The product should export from structured resume data, not from an edited browser copy of the Word file.
Future templates can share the same export pipeline as long as they fit the registry and placeholder rules.

downloads.title: Export saved resume versions
downloads.description: Download a fixed-template DOCX from here. PDF becomes available when a converter exists in the environment.
downloads.empty: No exportable resumes yet. Upload and tailor a resume first, then come back here.
